companyNameJapanese: 力成科技股份有限公司
description: Taiwan's leading memory-focused OSAT company. Provides IC packaging services including wafer-level packing, flip chips, wire bond BGA, lead frame, SiP, and chip probing/final test services. Key supplier to Micron for memory packaging. Operations in Taiwan, Japan, Singapore, USA, Europe, and China.

_externalRelationships.notes: World top-5 OSAT. HQ in Hsinchu, Taiwan. Founded 1997. Key memory OSAT for Micron. Memory OSAT prices jumped 30% in 2026, led by Powertech. Major buyer of wafer probing and dicing equipment from Japanese suppliers including ACCRETECH.
